card.title: mazer: mobile shell, portrait lock, and device harness
card.summary: Prove the phone-shell path for safe-area placement, exact touch registration, continuous stick intent, portrait behavior, and real-device confidence.
card.objective: Keep the canvas and every custom input surface in one live coordinate space while preserving a smooth 360-degree steering signal for grid-legal movement.
acceptanceCriteria: The rendered touch target and accepted game input agree across iPhone visual-viewport and safe-area origin changes.
Stick input publishes a continuous normalized vector without angular sectors or hysteresis buckets.
The grid resolver turns toward the strongest legal thumb projection and preserves bounded one-tile Smart Steering.
Physical phone feel, browser-chrome, and installed-PWA evidence remain required before terminal completion.
discoveries: The production surface exposes stick mode and Smart Steering enabled through the merged control contract.
Production play diagnostics preserve the 163px stick outer radius area with a 63px knob travel radius at 390x844.
nextActions: Collect operator physical-iPhone feel proof for direct turns, T-junctions, one-tile Smart Steering, and release behavior.
Collect physical touch-alignment proof across browser-chrome and safe-area origin changes.
Continue installed-PWA, authenticated keyboard, and browser-chrome proof without treating emulation as physical closure.
blockers: Physical-device post-deploy feel and safe-area proof remain operator-held.
evidence: Vercel production deployment dpl_2ZHL85A9uKeJJ1LXfdksMQxgXXrc is Ready and aliased to https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.

Production 390x844 proof reported stick mode, Smart Steering enabled, a visible 163px stick outer control with 63px travel radius, native canvas geometry, zero viewport violations, and zero browser warnings/errors.

entry.headline: Merged continuous-stick and touch-coordinate repair is live for physical-iPhone review
completed: Merged PR #78 to Mazer main as 993b8e5c68d59882c58cb2fb560b95bb980a4900.
Deployed the exact merge commit to Vercel production as dpl_2ZHL85A9uKeJJ1LXfdksMQxgXXrc.
Verified production at 390x844 with stick mode, Smart Steering enabled, native canvas geometry, visible continuous-stick control, zero viewport findings, and zero browser warnings/errors.
discovered: The canonical production alias is now the correct physical-device review target for the rebuilt controller.
next: Use operator iPhone testing to judge direct-turn capture, T-junction intent, one-tile lane shifts, touch alignment, and release feel.
